title: Help, Result Formatting, Streams, and Terminal Accessibility · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Stdout Stderr Status
summary: Commands mix data and prose, errors appear on stdout, help order changes across runs, long records become unreadable, and progress depends on color and cursor motion. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go stdout stderr status increment in screen-reader-friendly deterministic terminal presenter. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Assign data, diagnostics, progress, and usage to deliberate streams and return stable command outcomes or exit statuses.
Generate concise overview and per-command help from one registry while showing syntax, examples, defaults, and exit paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
